---
title: ""
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Example: Ranking of tennis players from the open era

Simple player ranking model from https://www.pymc-labs.com/blog-posts/pymc-stan-benchmark.

\[
s_p \sim \mathrm{Normal}(0, 1), \qquad p = 1,\ldots,P
\]

\[
\Pr(y_{pk}=1 \mid \mathbf{s})
=
\operatorname{logit}^{-1}
\left(s_{w_{pk}} - s_{\ell_{pk}}\right)
=
\frac{1}{1 + \exp\left[-(s_{w_{pk}} - s_{\ell_{pk}})\right]} .
\]

\[
y_{pk} \mid \mathbf{s}
\sim
\operatorname{Bernoulli}
\left\{
\operatorname{logit}^{-1}
\left(s_{w_{pk}} - s_{\ell_{pk}}\right)
\right\}.
\]

```{r cars}
library(XMCMC)
library(coda)

set.seed(123)

# ----------------------------
# Download Jeff Sackmann ATP data
# ----------------------------

since_year <- 1968L
end_year <- 2026L

download_atp_year <- function(year) {
    urls <- c(
        sprintf(
            "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JeffSackmann/tennis_atp/master/atp_matches_%d.csv",
            year
        ),
        sprintf(
            "https://github.com/JeffSackmann/tennis_atp/raw/master/atp_matches_%d.csv",
            year
        ),
        sprintf(
            "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/JeffSackmann/tennis_atp@master/atp_matches_%d.csv",
            year
        )
    )
    
    dest <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
    
    for (u in urls) {
        message("Trying ", year, ": ", u)
        
        ok <- tryCatch({
            download.file(
                url = u,
                destfile = dest,
                quiet = TRUE,
                mode = "wb",
                method = "libcurl"
            )
            TRUE
        }, error = function(e) FALSE)
        
        if (!ok || !file.exists(dest) || file.info(dest)$size == 0L) {
            next
        }
        
        first_line <- readLines(dest, n = 1L, warn = FALSE)
        
        if (length(first_line) == 1L && grepl("tourney_id", first_line) &&
            grepl("winner_id", first_line) && grepl("loser_id", first_line)) {
            x <- read.csv(dest, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
            x$year <- year
            message("  read ", nrow(x), " matches")
            return(x)
        }
    }
    
    message("  skipped ", year, ": could not download/read a valid ATP CSV")
    NULL
}

match_list <- lapply(seq.int(since_year, end_year), download_atp_year)
match_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), match_list)

if (length(match_list) == 0L) {
    stop("No ATP match files were downloaded. Try opening one URL in a browser, or clone JeffSackmann/tennis_atp locally.")
}

matches <- do.call(rbind, match_list)

matches <- matches[
    !is.na(matches$winner_id) &
        !is.na(matches$loser_id) &
        matches$winner_id != matches$loser_id,
]

cat("Raw matches:", nrow(matches), "\n")
# ----------------------------
# Build compact 1-based player ids
# ----------------------------
ids <- sort(unique(c(matches$winner_id, matches$loser_id)))
id_map <- setNames(seq_along(ids), ids)

winner_ids <- as.integer(id_map[as.character(matches$winner_id)])
loser_ids  <- as.integer(id_map[as.character(matches$loser_id)])

n_matches <- length(winner_ids)
n_players <- length(ids)

player_lookup <- data.frame(
    xmcmc_id = seq_along(ids),
    player_id = ids,
    player_name = NA_character_
)

nm <- rbind(
    data.frame(player_id = matches$winner_id, player_name = matches$winner_name),
    data.frame(player_id = matches$loser_id,  player_name = matches$loser_name)
)
nm <- nm[!duplicated(nm$player_id), ]

player_lookup$player_name <- nm$player_name[match(player_lookup$player_id, nm$player_id)]

cat("n_matches:", n_matches, "\n")
cat("n_players:", n_players, "\n")

# one local row for each player-match appearance
local_winner_ids <- c(winner_ids, winner_ids)
local_loser_ids  <- c(loser_ids, loser_ids)
local_win        <- rep.int(1L, 2L * n_matches)

local_player <- c(winner_ids, loser_ids)
ord <- order(local_player)

local_winner_ids <- as.integer(local_winner_ids[ord])
local_loser_ids  <- as.integer(local_loser_ids[ord])
local_win        <- as.integer(local_win[ord])
local_player     <- local_player[ord]

p_len <- as.integer(tabulate(local_player, nbins = n_players))
p_start <- as.integer(cumsum(c(1L, head(p_len, -1L))))

# because local rows are already sorted by player, local_pos is just row number
local_pos <- as.integer(seq_along(local_win))

win <- rep.int(1L, n_matches)

mod_data <- list(
    n_matches = as.integer(n_matches),
    n_players = as.integer(n_players),
    win = as.integer(win),
    winner_ids = as.integer(winner_ids),
    loser_ids = as.integer(loser_ids),
    p_start = as.integer(p_start),
    p_len = as.integer(p_len),
    local_pos = as.integer(local_pos),
    local_winner_ids = as.integer(local_winner_ids),
    local_loser_ids = as.integer(local_loser_ids),
    local_win = as.integer(local_win)
)

# ----------------------------
# XMCMC model
# ----------------------------

model_src <- '
param skill(n_players)
block skill(p) {
  skill(p) ~ dnorm(0.0, 1.0);
  for (k = 0:(p_len(p)-1)) {
    local_win(1) ~ dbern(inv_logit(skill(local_winner_ids(local_pos(p_start(p) + k))) - skill(local_loser_ids(local_pos(p_start(p) + k)))));
  }
}
'

library(XMCMC)

fit <- XMCMC(model = model_src, data = mod_data, samples = 5000,
    burnin = 1000, out = "tennis_chain.bin", log_cache_bits = 20L)

# draws <- read_XMCMC("tennis_chain.bin")

draws <- as.data.frame(read_XMCMC("tennis_chain.bin"))

skill_cols <- grep("^skill\\[", names(draws), value = TRUE)

top_players <- order(p_len, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(12L, length(p_len))]
plot_cols <- c("log_sd[1]", paste0("skill[", top_players, "]"))
plot_cols <- plot_cols[plot_cols %in% names(draws)]

plot_trace_pages <- function(draws, cols, n_per_page = 4L) {
    old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
    on.exit(par(old_par), add = TRUE)
    
    pages <- split(cols, ceiling(seq_along(cols) / n_per_page))
    
    for (page in seq_along(pages)) {
        these <- pages[[page]]
        
        dev.new(width = 9, height = 2.4 * length(these))
        par(mfrow = c(length(these), 1), mar = c(3, 4, 2, 1))
        
        for (nm in these) {
            plot(
                draws[[nm]],
                type = "l",
                main = nm,
                xlab = "Saved draw",
                ylab = "Value"
            )
        }
    }
}

plot_trace_pages(draws, plot_cols, n_per_page = 4L)


# ----------------------------
# Convert to coda object
# ----------------------------

library(coda)

draws <- as.data.frame(read_XMCMC("tennis_chain.bin"))
mcmc_draws <- as.mcmc(draws[, plot_cols, drop = FALSE])

cat("\nESS for plotted parameters:\n")
print(effectiveSize(mcmc_draws))

cat("\nSummary for plotted parameters:\n")
print(summary(mcmc_draws))

draws <- as.data.frame(read_XMCMC("tennis_chain.bin"))

skill_cols <- grep("^skill", names(draws), value = TRUE)

skill_id <- as.integer(gsub("[^0-9]", "", skill_cols))
skill_means <- colMeans(draws[, skill_cols, drop = FALSE])

ok <- !is.na(skill_id) & skill_id >= 1 & skill_id <= nrow(player_lookup)

all_ranked <- data.frame(
    xmcmc_id = skill_id[ok],
    player_id = player_lookup$player_id[skill_id[ok]],
    player = player_lookup$player_name[skill_id[ok]],
    mean_score = as.numeric(skill_means[ok]),
    n_matches = p_len[skill_id[ok]]
)

all_ranked <- all_ranked[order(-all_ranked$mean_score), ]
all_ranked$rank <- seq_len(nrow(all_ranked))

all_ranked <- all_ranked[, c(
    "rank", "xmcmc_id", "player_id", "player", "mean_score", "n_matches"
)]

print(head(all_ranked, 50), row.names = FALSE)

unlink("tennis_chain.bin")
unlink("tennis_chain.bin.metadata.rds")
unlink("tennis_chain.bin.param_names.rds")
```
